prestazioni: Hybrid powertrain upgrade featuring a bespoke P48B20 3.0L twin-turbo inline-6 paired with two electric motors (front and rear), recalibrated via a Motec M150 ECU with a custom hybrid torque-split map for 0-60 mph in 2.8s. The internal combustion engine receives a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, upgraded to 2.2 bar boost, and a titanium 4.5" exhaust system by Akrapovic with electronically controlled valves for backpressure optimization.

Full carbon-fiber driveshaft and differential housing by Pankl Racing Systems, reducing rotational mass by 32% while increasing torque capacity to 1,200 Nm. The rear e-motor is cooled via a dedicated Asetek 800W liquid cooling loop with a secondary heat exchanger mounted in the rear diffuser.

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and hybrid mode for track/street switching), paired with MCS 2-way adjustable remote-reservoir dampers at the rear. The front suspension features custom billet aluminum control arms by 034 Motorsport with spherical bearings and adjustable camber plates set to -3.8 degrees for optimal turn-in under hybrid torque vectoring.
estetica: Full carbon-fiber body kit by Liberty Walk LB-WORKS, including a custom front splitter with active aerodynamic flaps (syncing with the hybrid system for downforce adjustment), side skirts with integrated LED lighting, and a rear diffuser with a Gurney flap adjustable via the iDrive system. The kit reduces drag coefficient to 0.23 while generating 450 kg of downforce at 180 mph.

Custom 22" forged aluminum wheels by HRE Performance Wheels (FF16 model), staggered 9.5x22 ET25 front and 12.5x22 ET15 rear, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 front, 325/25 rear) with a semi-slick compound for hybrid torque management. The wheels feature a titanium lug nut system by Bimecc for weight reduction.

Interior overhaul with full Alcantara and carbon-fiber trim by Recaro, including a custom CS Sportster GT-E II bucket seat with 6-point Schroth harnesses. The digital dashboard is replaced with a 12.3" curved display by AEM Electronics, running a custom CAN bus interface to monitor hybrid system telemetry, turbo pressure, and torque split in real-time. The steering wheel is a suede-wrapped MOMO Prototipo with integrated paddle shifters for manual hybrid torque adjustments.
